llm_advice.rationale: Baseline profile shows bottleneck is multiple ATen GEMM and add launches. Keeping cuBLAS for the large W @ X GEMM is optimal. Fusing the rank-16 path (B.T @ X + A @ result) into a single custom kernel will reduce launch overhead and improve memory locality. We will first test a simple scalar kernel for lower risk, then a vectorized version for potential higher performance.
risk_controls: keep cuBLAS for W @ X unchanged
use dynamic grid and block sizes based on d
validate correctness for all d in [3584, 4608]
stop_conditions: or after evaluating both scalar and vector kernels without improvement
or encountering correctness failures that cannot be fixed

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
